intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy following the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan for processing the first sample:

input.title: scanpy QC+Clustering: Patient 145 Day 0 PBMC
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq workflow on the first sample (GSM5746259): QC metrics → filtering → normalization → highly variable genes → PCA → kNN graph → UMAP → Leiden clustering → cluster marker genes.
input.rationale: Produce a first-pass view of cell types and quality in a single COVID-19 patient's baseline PBMC sample.
input.assumptions:
- Using first sample only: Patient 145, Day 0 (7,532 cells)
- Standard thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial fraction < 20%
- Leiden resolution = 1.0 (default, suitable for PBMC diversity)
- Highly variable genes: top 2,000

steps.title: Load the first sample and calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Extract patient 145 day 0 from the combined object, compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito, ribosomal %

steps.title: QC plots: pre-filter distribution
steps.description: Violin/scatter plots of QC metrics to inspect filtering thresholds

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or pct_mito > 20%; remove genes expressed in < 3 cells

steps.title: PCA
steps.description: scanpy.tl.pca on HVG; compute variance explained

steps.title: Build kNN graph and compute UMAP
Marker gene dotplot
steps.description: Top markers per cluster as heatmap/dotplot
